data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying decision-making by reducing choices at a given time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and categorized content to prevent user overload.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing target selection speed and accuracy.
data.technical_spec: Well-sized buttons and consistent cursor movement paths.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Presenting information in chunks to improve user memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Content broken into digestible parts like cards or sections.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhancing usability with aesthetically pleasing design.
data.technical_spec: Modern design elements and intuitive interfaces to build trust.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Providing users with familiar design patterns.
data.technical_spec: Consistency with common web standards to enhance user comfort.
